prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Cleveland 351C (engine code: 351-4V) with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products, featuring 4340 steel crankshaft (3.85" stroke), H-beam connecting rods (6.535" length), and forged aluminum pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) for a 408ci stroker build. Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (248/254 duration @ 0.050", 0.600" lift, 110° LSA) and ported Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.19" intake, 1.71" exhaust valves) for 550+ hp on 98 octane pump gas.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm, 850hp capable) with a custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and a Turbosmart Race Port 50mm wastegate. Intercooling handled by a custom air-to-water setup using a PWR Performance intercooler core (1200hp rated) and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump. Fuel system upgraded with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000 injectors (2000cc/min), and a Holley Dominator ECU for standalone engine management.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission (2.87 first gear) paired with a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch (1200lb clamp load) and a Ford 9" rear end with a Strange Engineering S60 differential (3.70:1 gear ratio, 35-spline axles, and a Detroit Locker for maximum traction). Suspension upgraded with a full Hotchkis TVS Stage 2 kit (front and rear sway bars, subframe connectors, and adjustable coilovers with Bilstein B8 shocks) for improved handling.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rare Spares XC Cobra replica kit (fiberglass fenders, quarter panels, and front bumper) with additional custom flares to fit 10.5" and 12.5" wide wheels front and rear. Paint scheme in Ford "Grabber Blue" with white racing stripes and a matte black hood scoop for the intercooler piping.

Wheel setup featuring 18x10.5" and 18x12.5" Weld Racing RT-S wheels (ET25 front, ET5 rear) wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R tires (295/40R18 front, 335/35R18 rear). Brake system upgraded to a Wilwood 6-piston front big brake kit (14" rotors) and a 4-piston rear kit (12" rotors) with DOT-approved race pads for consistent stopping power.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full TMI Products custom upholstery kit (black Alcantara with blue stitching), a Sparco Pro 2000 racing seat with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, mild steel, MIG-welded) for chassis rigidity and safety. Gauges upgraded to a full Defi Advance BF series setup (oil pressure, boost, water temp, fuel pressure) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod.
